title: Warm up
content: The slide includes images representing three Chinese cities: Beijing, Chongqing, and Hangzhou.

title: AN EVOLVING NATION
content: This slide presents the theme of 'A Ride Through China' with images symbolizing transportation and traditional architecture.

title: Session 1 Match the City Chain! Investigate and research
content: The session focuses on identifying local features, development strategies, and the positive impact outcomes in city development.

title: Match the city to its development strategy
content: Cities are matched with their specific development strategies: Beijing with technology and tradition integration, Chongqing with sustainable urban development, and Hangzhou with tourism and economic growth.

title: Through the eyes of taxi drivers...
content: This slide highlights different development strategies seen through the perspective of taxi drivers in terms of urban sustainability, economic growth, and technology integration.
